steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which choice most effectively emphasizes the location of Casa Luis Barragán. The correct answer must make Mexico City, Mexico the focal point — not the architect, architecture style, or design features.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — The architect responsible for designing Casa Luis Barragán.: Focuses on Luis Barragán as the architect, not on location. ✗
  • Choice B — A stunning example of minimalist architecture, Luis Barragán's Casa Luis Barragán features colorful concrete walls and a famous cantilevered staircase.: Emphasizes architectural style and design features, not location. ✗
  • Choice C — Luis Barragán is known for designing a residential home that features colorful concrete walls and a famous cantilevered staircase.: Centers on the architect and design details — no mention of location at all. ✗
  • Choice D — Those wishing to see Casa Luis Barragán in person will have to travel to Mexico City, Mexico.: Makes Mexico City, Mexico the destination and central information of the sentence. ✓
That is the correct answer.
